summary: Iteration 31: Tier 1 package upgrades verification complete. All 3 major upgrades working correctly: Vite 4→8.0.8 (Rolldown), TailwindCSS 3→4.2.2 (CSS-first @theme), React 18→19.2.5 + react-helmet-async 3.0.0. All 29/29 Vitest unit tests pass. All UI flows working with upgraded packages. Brand colors correctly applied after TW4 migration.

test_results.yarn_test: PASS — 29/29 Vitest unit tests pass (12 in constants.test.js, 17 in mappers.test.js). Exits 0 in 0.78s.

package_upgrades_verified.vite: v8.0.8 — Working. Frontend loads correctly, HMR working, no build errors
package_upgrades_verified.tailwindcss: v4.2.2 — Working. CSS-first config with @theme directives, @import 'tailwindcss', brand colors correctly applied
package_upgrades_verified.react: v19.2.5 — Working. createRoot API, all components render correctly
package_upgrades_verified.react-helmet-async: v3.0.0 — Working. HelmetProvider wrapper in App.jsx, meta tags render correctly

brand_colors_verified.tw4_theme_variables: Working — @theme directives properly define CSS custom properties

test_results.demo_manager_login: PASS — Click 'Try Demo Account' → dialog opens → 'Log in as Manager' → navigates to /manager. All 8 tabs visible and clickable (Tournaments, Assignments, Roster, Referees, Availability, Leaderboard, Standings, Reports)
test_results.demo_referee_login: PASS — Click 'Try Demo Account' → dialog opens → 'Log in as Referee' → navigates to /dashboard. Welcome message, stats cards, upcoming games, recent payments visible
test_results.landing_page: PASS — Loads with motion animations, hero text with brand colors, navigation links, CTA buttons
test_results.login_page: PASS — Renders with motion animations, form inputs, demo button, brand styling
test_results.register_page: PASS — Loads with form inputs (name, email, phone, role, password, confirm password)
test_results.dashboard_page: PASS — Renders with stats cards (Games This Month, Total Earnings, Pending Payments, Rating), upcoming games, recent payments, quick actions, live activity feed
test_results.calendar_page: PASS — Renders with react-day-picker v9 calendar showing April 2026 with game events, month/week/day views
test_results.performance_analytics_page: PASS — Renders with recharts v3 (BarChart for Monthly Earnings, BarChart for Games Per Month, PieChart for Rating Distribution)
test_results.messages_page: PASS — Renders with inbox, message list, compose button, date-fns formatted timestamps
test_results.settings_page: PASS — Renders with 7 notification toggles, app preferences (dark mode, sound effects), language/timezone, account security
test_results.schedule_page: PASS — Renders with game list, date-fns formatted dates (April 2nd, 2026), accept/decline buttons
test_results.profile_page: PASS — Renders with personal info, certifications, performance ratings, edit button, change photo button
test_results.games_page: PASS — Renders with game cards, in progress/upcoming/completed sections, date-fns formatted dates
test_results.about_page: PASS — Renders with hero section, mission/vision/team cards
test_results.contact_page: PASS — Renders with contact form (name, email, subject, message)
test_results.dark_mode_toggle: PASS — Toggle in TopBar works, UI transitions to dark theme with proper colors
test_results.notification_bell: PASS — Shows unread count (1) in TopBar
test_results.navigation: PASS — Navigation between all pages works correctly (react-router v7)

success_rate.backend: N/A (100% Firebase Firestore - no traditional backend)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 3 Tier 1 package upgrades verified, 29/29 unit tests pass, all UI flows working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 31 all green. Tier 1 package upgrades verified: Vite 8.0.8 (Rolldown bundler), TailwindCSS 4.2.2 (CSS-first config with @theme, @import 'tailwindcss', tailwind.config.js removed), React 19.2.5 + react-helmet-async 3.0.0. Brand colors (#0080C8 blue, #FF8C00 orange) correctly applied via TW4 @theme directives. All demo login flows working. All pages render correctly with upgraded packages. Dark mode toggle working.
rca_of_issues: N/A — No bugs found. All Tier 1 package upgrades working correctly.
